title: MV Hondius expedition completes voyage; index case identified
description: Initial Andes hantavirus case linked to the MV Hondius expedition is identified after disembarkation; multinational case-finding begins.

title: WHO publishes Disease Outbreak News DON599
description: WHO issues DON599 describing the initial Andes hantavirus cluster aboard MV Hondius and the multinational case-finding effort.

title: ECDC Rapid Risk Assessment published
description: ECDC publishes a Rapid Risk Assessment for the cruise-ship hantavirus cluster, recommending escalation to airborne precautions during aerosol-generating procedures.

title: CDC issues HAN 528
description: CDC issues Health Alert Network 528 for U.S. clinical awareness, infection prevention, and exposure reporting for Andes virus.

title: Radboud UMC places 12 staff in precautionary quarantine
description: 12 staff at Radboud UMC in Nijmegen, Netherlands, placed in precautionary quarantine after an incorrect blood-sampling procedure was followed with a confirmed Andes hantavirus patient.

title: ECDC surveillance update — 11 cases, 3 deaths
description: ECDC publishes an updated surveillance summary: 9 confirmed and 2 probable cases (11 total) with 3 deaths reported across 9 countries; risk for the EU/EEA assessed as VERY LOW.

title: Ebola readiness signal added for DRC and neighbouring-region monitoring
description: Monitoring record added for Ebola disease preparedness and source verification; publish case counts or health-zone details only from a specific WHO or Africa CDC outbreak report.

title: U.S. measles surveillance remains under review
description: Monitoring record added for U.S. measles outbreak surveillance and Americas elimination-status implications; verify current counts against CDC and PAHO updates.

title: Mpox clade I and importation readiness remains under review
description: Monitoring record added for mpox clinical and laboratory readiness; verify current country trends and importation details against specific Africa CDC, WHO, or CDC updates.

title: Zoonotic influenza watch remains active
description: Monitoring record added for H5 animal-health activity and sporadic human-exposure investigations; verify subtype-specific human case details against WHO or CDC event updates.

title: Cholera preparedness signal added for sub-Saharan Africa
description: Monitoring record added for cholera preparedness where WASH disruption and population movement can amplify outbreaks; verify country-level figures against WHO or Africa CDC reports.

title: Chikungunya surveillance signal added
description: Monitoring record added for chikungunya activity in mosquito-active regions; verify current country burden against specific PAHO or WHO updates.

title: C. auris wastewater monitoring signal added
description: Monitoring record added for C. auris wastewater and clinical surveillance interpretation; verify current state-level details against CDC NWSS, WastewaterSCAN, or local public health reporting.
